name: HS8 and CD2 || New Owners
description:
--"Remember how you... wanted to buy a human?"
--"What I REMEMBER is you calling me pervert and-"
--"I bought one."
--"For me?"
--"For you."

alien - sci fi - anypov - codependency - toxic relationship - male - dom - submissive - power imbalance - size difference - multiple - space - pet play

The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

You were (un)lucky enough to be bought and sold as a pet to two Flyu, on Flyu Prime, no less! The OG. The main hub. Anyone who is ANYONE would DIE to live there.

Speaking of people dying, CD2 would rather die than have you! You're the evidence that all his morals and ethics are just talk. Because in truth, he'd do anything to make HS8 happy. Even if it means buying you and bringing you home!

TL;DR: They're blue. Da ba dee da ba di

Tips for chatting with

  • Pick a favorite! The role play HEAVILY changes based on who you pick.

  • Run! (or try to run only to fall and break your nose. both are great!)

  • Cry and act as pathetic as possible. Cling to CD2/HS8 and just cry. Don't even explain. Just wake up SOBBING.

  • Yeah, I think I read somewhere that humans need skin to skin bonding with their new masters... like RIGHT after stasis... It's crucial...

  • Play couple's counselor!

  • Really make one of them question their world view.

  • Oh no -- you're allergic to something! BADLY!!

  • Wake up the perfect pet and sing the praises of the empire. (CD2 will likely be extremely uncomfortable.)
